summary: Phase 0 (pre-launch teaser + B1.1/B1.7 bugfix) regression — comprehensive backend + frontend testing. 18/18 pytest tests passed and all frontend acceptance criteria met. Persona teaser CMS pages serve via GET /api/cms/pages with correct waitlist_persona, benefits, badges, cover_color. Public POST /api/beta-waitlist handles new + duplicate + invalid-email correctly. POST /api/webhooks/zoho-survey accepts arbitrary payloads, extracts email from top-level field and responses[].answer, returns proper shape, auto-adds to beta_waitlist. Admin endpoints (beta-waitlist, zoho-survey-responses, buildings) return new shapes; total counts match. B1.1: PATCH /api/buildings/{id}/terrace regenerates recommendations — required_area matches new value AND derived CO2 (area*3.5) matches expected. B1.7: admin/buildings returns {buildings,total,limit,sort} with default created_at_desc, supports limit up to 2000, total matches collection count (93). Frontend: 4 persona slugs render correctly with WaitlistForm; submission shows 'You're on the list' success state; landing /persona-switcher with 4 cards; homeowner card navigates to /for-homeowners. Admin Buildings tab card description shows 'Showing 93 of 93 buildings (newest first)' (matches required format exactly).

issues: Embedded Zoho Survey iframe shows 'Survey is not available' on all 4 pages — likely placeholder survey_url. Confirm with main agent whether the survey URLs are intentional placeholders for Phase 0 or need to be replaced with the real Zoho survey URLs before launch.

Benefit cards do not expose a data-testid (e.g. 'benefit-card-*'). Cards are rendered and visible, but automated tests can't easily count them. Low-priority: add data-testid='benefit-card' on each benefit card in CmsPage.js for future regression.

action_items: (Optional, nice-to-have) Add data-testid='benefit-card' to each benefit card inside CmsPage.js so the benefits grid can be asserted in regression.
(Pre-launch checklist) Verify the embedded Zoho Survey URLs are live before public launch — currently the iframe renders 'Survey is not available' for all 4 persona pages.

Pre-existing (carried over from iteration_7, not Phase 0): React hydration warning '

cannot contain a nested

' from GeminiAnalysisDialog DialogDescription — not related to Phase 0 but still present in console.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py crossed 2900 lines — Phase 0 added BetaWaitlist + Zoho webhook + regenerate_recommendations_for_building inline. Recommend extracting CMS / waitlist / webhook routes into a routers/ package (FastAPI APIRouter modules) per the <700-line guideline.

regenerate_recommendations_for_building only regenerates the sol_terrace_green solution type and is silent (returns skipped='no_solution_type' etc.) when other categories exist for the building — stale recommendations for other solution types may remain after a terrace edit. Either delete all old recommendations for the building first, or iterate over all active solution types and regenerate each.

BetaWaitlistEntry.email uses pydantic EmailStr which raises 422 on invalid email — fine, but consider also normalizing/validating persona against the known enum (citizen | citizen-crisis | rwa | vendor) and rejecting unknown values to keep the data clean.

/api/webhooks/zoho-survey is fully PUBLIC with no signature verification. Anyone can POST junk into db.zoho_survey_responses + db.beta_waitlist. Recommend adding a shared secret (e.g. ZOHO_WEBHOOK_SECRET in .env) compared against a header before accepting, or at minimum rate-limit + IP allowlist this endpoint before launch.

Admin /api/admin/buildings response shape changed from list to dict — frontend has backward-compat fallback (good). However any external integration that consumed the old shape will break. Worth flagging in CHANGELOG.
test_credentials: Used Mongo-direct admin session creation for user_e4e27c763fa2 (gp@sus10.ai). Session created on the fly in fixture + cleaned up in teardown. No new credentials needed.
seed_data_creation: Tests insert TEST emails via POST /api/beta-waitlist (~2 unique addresses) + 2 zoho-survey-responses + 1 raw webhook + 1 admin session row. Webhook + waitlist test rows persist (no cleanup) — these are intentional smoketest signals for the admin endpoints.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 0 verified working end-to-end. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_phase0_teaser_and_bugfixes.py is parameterized over 4 persona slugs and includes B1.1 regen check (uses bld_001 if available). Frontend was tested by injecting an admin session_token via both localStorage AND cookie before navigating to /admin — both worked. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://sus10-preview.preview.emergentagent.com when invoking pytest (env var must be set; the test file does not provide a default).
rca of the issue: N/A — no regressions found. Initial pytest run failed due to: (1) test expecting endpoint /api/buildings/{id}/recommendations which does not exist — actual endpoint is /api/buildings/{id}/solutions; fixed in test. (2) New area '1234' formatted as '1,234 sqm' in the explainability response — substring assertion was too strict; updated to also accept comma-formatted form AND additionally verify derived CO2 = area*3.5. Both were test-side issues, not code bugs.
